lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The deep closed over Jonah, yet the LORD appointed a great fish to preserve him.

lines.speaker: Jonah
lines.text: Three lights rise around me. The eastern one should stay dim. Let the others answer with light.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The living walls pulse with light, and the chamber grows still enough for prayer.

lines.speaker: Jonah
lines.text: Salvation belongs to the LORD. From the belly of Sheol, He heard me.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: At the word of the LORD, the fish gave Jonah up upon the dry land.
